title: How 'Xi Jinping Thought' is meant to make China great again
description: Chinese President Xi Jinping is likely to start a historic third term — and further elevate his ideology in Chinese law and society.
keywords: China, Xi Jinping, Xi Jinping Thought, Chinese Communist Party, CCP, Mao Zedong, Chairman Mao, ideology
